productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue jeans with a washed and heavily distressed look, made of 71% cotton, 28% polyester and 1% spandex, has two insert pockets on the front with brand logo embroidered above the left pocket and brand name appliqued on the right side pocket, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand name appliqued on the waist at the back, belt loops on waistband and a metal zipper and button closure on the front Fit Low rise Slim fit Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not iron to retain the creasing effect Dry in shade Look cool and casual in these heavily distressed washed blue jeans from flying machine. The washed and frayed look gives you an individual style, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with tees and canvas shoes. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
